title: Availability Calculator
description: Calculate system availability from MTBF and MTTR values
code:
def calculate_availability(mtbf, mttr):
 """
 Calculate system availability percentage
 Args: mtbf - Mean Time Between Failures (hours)
 mttr - Mean Time To Repair (hours)
 Returns: Availability percentage
 """
 total_time = mtbf + mttr
 availability = (mtbf / total_time) * 100
 return round(availability, 2)

def calculate_downtime_year(availability_pct):
 """Calculate annual downtime given availability percentage"""
 hours_per_year = 8760
 downtime_hours = hours_per_year * (1 - availability_pct/100)
 return round(downtime_hours, 2)

# Example usage
mtbf = 2000 # hours
mttr = 5 # hours
avail = calculate_availability(mtbf, mttr)
downtime = calculate_downtime_year(avail)
print(f"Availability: {avail}%")
print(f"Annual Downtime: {downtime} hours")
explanation: This code calculates system availability using the standard formula MTBF/(MTBF+MTTR) and computes expected annual downtime

title: Capacity Threshold Monitor
description: Monitor system resources against defined thresholds
explanation: This code monitors system metrics against predefined thresholds, generating alerts when resources approach capacity limits for proactive management

complexity.time: O(n) where n is number of metrics
